Components / Folder Tabs

Preview theme

Folder Tabs

Compact tab pattern where the active tab expands to fill available width with a white background, while inactive tabs shrink to their content with a gray background. An optional set of action buttons appears inline within the active tab on the right side.

Basic

Active tab expands to fill width; inactive tabs shrink to content

With Icons

leadingIcon visible on all tabs

With Actions

activeActions on FolderTabs — rendered inline in the active tab

Per-Tab Actions

Different actions per tab via activeActions={actions[tab]}

Disabled State

disabled tab — not clickable, reduced opacity

Motion Disabled

disableMotion — active tab snaps instantly

FolderTabs Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
valuestring—Controlled selected tab value.
defaultValuestring""Uncontrolled initial selected value.
onChange(value: string) => void—Called when the selected tab changes.
activeActionsReactNode—Content rendered inline within the active tab on the right side. Use the value from onChange to vary actions per tab.
surface"default" | "shadow-border""default"Adds a shadow ring around the container.
disableMotionbooleanfalseDisables layout animation — active tab snaps instantly.
layoutIdstringautoMotion layout ID for the active tab. Auto-generated if omitted.
classNamestring—Additional classes on the container.
childrenReactNode—FolderTab elements.

FolderTab Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
valuestring—Unique value identifying this tab.
disabledbooleanfalsePrevents selection and reduces opacity.
leadingIconReactNode—16×16 icon rendered before the label — visible on all tabs.
classNamestring—Additional classes on the tab button.
childrenReactNode—Tab label content.

Usage

tsx
import { FolderTabs, FolderTab } from '@spaceship/design-system';
import { Button } from '@spaceship/design-system';
import { RefreshCw, ExternalLink, Code2, Eye } from 'lucide-react';

// Uncontrolled
<FolderTabs defaultValue="code">
  <FolderTab value="code"    leadingIcon={<Code2 />}>Code</FolderTab>
  <FolderTab value="preview" leadingIcon={<Eye />}>Preview</FolderTab>
</FolderTabs>

// Shared actions inline in the active tab
const [tab, setTab] = useState('code');

<FolderTabs
  value={tab}
  onChange={setTab}
  activeActions={
    <>
      <Button variant="secondary" size="icon-sm" leadingIcon={<RefreshCw />} />
      <Button variant="secondary" size="icon-sm" leadingIcon={<ExternalLink />} />
    </>
  }
>
  <FolderTab value="code"    leadingIcon={<Code2 />}>Code</FolderTab>
  <FolderTab value="preview" leadingIcon={<Eye />}>Preview</FolderTab>
</FolderTabs>

// Different actions per tab
const tabActions = { code: <Button ... />, preview: <Button ... /> };

<FolderTabs value={tab} onChange={setTab} activeActions={tabActions[tab]}>
  <FolderTab value="code"    leadingIcon={<Code2 />}>Code</FolderTab>
  <FolderTab value="preview" leadingIcon={<Eye />}>Preview</FolderTab>
</FolderTabs>
